title: Los asesinatos y lesiones graves producidos en el atentado de Tarata (1992)
author_or_org: Comisión de la Verdad y Reconciliación del Perú
strengths: Compact, high-quality official case summary with a clean direct casualty ledger.
limitations: No usable denominator for all people exposed to the blast footprint.
notes: Primary and largely sufficient source for the bundle.
